raw_consumer_statement: I reported 24 fraudulent, unauthorized charges on my American Express XXXX card on XX/XX/year>. Despite prompt reporting and full cooperation, American Express has failed to conclude the fraud investigation after more than XXXX months, exceeding the timelines required under the Fair Credit Billing Act. I keep being told that I have to keep waiting for a response from the fraud department. I have not received a final determination in writing, and the prolonged delay has caused unnecessary stress and potential financial harm. American Express has not provided a valid explanation for the delay nor a definitive resolution date. I am requesting : Immediate closure of the investigation Permanent removal of fraudulent charges Reversal of any associated interest or fees Written confirmation that my credit has not been negatively impacted This prolonged delay constitutes a failure to comply with federal consumer protection laws.
